sections.name: Hero Section
sections.purpose: A prominent banner designed to immediately capture visitor attention and convey the core message of ESG World.

sections.name: Introduction Section
sections.purpose: A brief overview of ESG World's mission and purpose, inviting visitors to learn more.

sections.name: Services Overview
sections.purpose: A concise display of the key services offered, with quick links to their respective detailed pages.

sections.name: Testimonials Section
sections.purpose: Showcases positive feedback from clients, building trust and credibility for ESG World.

sections.name: Call to Action Section
sections.purpose: Prompts visitors to take the next step, such as contacting ESG World or exploring a specific service.

sections.name: Our Story & Mission
sections.purpose: Details the history, vision, and core mission of ESG World, establishing its identity and goals.

sections.name: Our Values & Approach
sections.purpose: Explains the fundamental principles and methodologies that guide ESG World's operations and interactions.

sections.name: Our Team
sections.purpose: Introduces the key members of the ESG World team, highlighting their expertise and dedication.

sections.name: Why Choose Us
sections.purpose: Articulates the unique benefits and competitive advantages clients gain by partnering with ESG World.

sections.name: Services Introduction
sections.purpose: An overview of ESG World's comprehensive service offerings, highlighting their commitment to sustainability solutions.

sections.name: Education Services
sections.purpose: Provides detailed information about ESG World's educational programs and training initiatives.

sections.name: Waste Management Services
sections.purpose: Outlines ESG World's solutions and strategies for effective waste reduction, recycling, and disposal.

sections.name: Transport Services
sections.purpose: Describes ESG World's offerings related to sustainable transportation solutions and logistics optimization.

sections.name: Building Services
sections.purpose: Details ESG World's expertise in sustainable building practices, design, and infrastructure development.

sections.name: Contact Form
sections.purpose: An interactive form allowing visitors to easily submit inquiries and messages directly to ESG World.

sections.name: Contact Information
sections.purpose: Provides essential details like phone numbers, email addresses, and physical office locations for direct communication.

sections.name: Location Map
sections.purpose: An embedded map to help visitors easily find the physical location of ESG World's offices.

sections.name: Business Hours
sections.purpose: Clearly states the operating hours of ESG World, indicating when clients can expect assistance.
